div.p: On July 25 at 3 p.m., the United Nations Security Council met for the first time since July 7; for the record of the July 25th session, see U.N. document S/PV.477. During this meeting, Ambassador Austin read the text (U.N. document S/1626) of the first report submitted to the Security Council by the United States Government, under date of July 24, 1950, in accordance with the Security Council resolution of July 7.
